title: Fix Short Circuiting with Associative Array Accesses

features.name: short_circuit_or_with_assoc_array_insert
features.description: Code should include a short-circuit OR expression where the left operand evaluates to true and the right operand is an associative array bracket access that would insert an element

features.name: assoc_array_next_method
features.description: Code should include an associative array with the .next() method being called and its result used in a short-circuit expression
